title: Feedback submission
description: Body of POST /v1/feedback for the feedback-spec convention. See PROTOCOL.md §1.

message.description: The feedback text. Empty/whitespace-only is rejected with 400.

app.description: Short tool identifier, e.g. 'hart'. Required at the relay; an app's own endpoint may omit it.

version.description: The tool's version at submission time.

kind.description: Feedback category. Known values below; unknown values are preserved. Default 'note'.

context.description: What the user or agent was doing (free text).

reporter.description: Who filed it — a username, 'agent', or an email. Defaults to $USER, else 'agent'.

id.description: Client-generated idempotency key (reference: 16 random bytes, hex). Storage is INSERT-OR-IGNORE on this. If omitted, the server generates and returns one.
